summary: Deep pattern audit triggered after two bugs in first pass revealed same patterns codebase-wide. 3 distinct bug classes found across 12 files.

bug_classes.effect: shouldAgentRun() returned Promise instead of decision struct. Coordination always bypassed — agents ran unconditionally.
execSync('pm2 jlist') blocked Node event loop ~200-400ms per call. CLAUDE.md landmine #2.
bug_classes.fix: Replaced with promisify(exec) + await execAsync. Made pm2List() async.

files: scripts/mission-control-agent-runner.js (2 — fixed in first pass, different manifestation)
bug_classes.effect: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'toFixed') — process crash on every invocation when DB returns null or state object is partial
bug_classes.pattern: object.field.toFixed(N) where field may be undefined
bug_classes.fix: Number(x || 0).toFixed(N) — or Number(obj?.field || 0).toFixed(N) for chained access
bug_classes.most_critical: cost-coordinator.js — fires on every LLM approval request when budget is tight

patterns_checked_not_found: Duplicate module-level constants (FRESHNESS_SLA style) — none found
fs.openSync leaks — architect-api.js has openSync but has corresponding closeSync
const-inside-try-outside-catch — widespread but mostly false positives from scanner; real uses are within same try scope

post_fix_verification.openclaw_coordinator: online, stable at 13 restarts (iterations during fix), uptime 24s
post_fix_verification.global_status_pulse: one-shot cron — ran successfully GREEN (18 checks), exited normally

remaining_known_issues: claw_tasks_ai: 100 failed tasks — EXCLUSIVE_LOCK_BUSY on classify (contention, not new)
claw_tasks_infra: 100 failed — security_sweep partial fails (3 open criticals in sprint)
claw_tasks_io_heavy: 100 failed — repo_autofix quarantine loop (known, reaper correct)
openclaw-coordinator restart count elevated (13) due to fix iteration restarts — will decay
